description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design with clean lines and large windows. The front facade is accented by a covered entryway supported by columns and flanked by a driveway and stepping stones. The rear of the bungalow includes a fenced patio area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a hot tub, as well as a shaded gazebo and lush landscaping with palm trees and flowering shrubs. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light tones, creating a striking contrast. Multiple sliding glass doors and expansive windows provide ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The overall layout is open and spacious, with outdoor living spaces integrated seamlessly into the design.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a covered entry, and a rear patio featuring a pool and gazebo. The exterior combines dark and light finishes with lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered entryway, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, outdoor seating area, and the rear patio with a pool and gazebo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced patio, swimming pool, hot tub, lounge chairs, and a shaded gazebo with lush plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear landscaping, patio fencing, and additional windows along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
